positive: Minimalist graphic illustration of a whimsical celestial scene: a stylized crescent moon hanging above a cluster of abstract constellations formed by delicate geometric lines and glowing nebula gas. Below the moon, a silhouette of a lone, stylized mountain range is visible against a gradient cosmic background of deep midnight blue, soft lavender, and dusty gold. The style should be clean, vibrant, and modern, resembling vector art combined with ethereal watercolor washes. Strong black outlines on the main subjects (moon and mountains) to ensure pop against the colorful background. Centered, symmetrical composition. High contrast, perfect for direct-to-garment printing. Aspect ratio 1:1. --ar 1:1
